# Generated by sml2c.  Do not edit.
add_executable(test_fmu test_fmu.c)
target_include_directories(test_fmu PRIVATE ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/include)
target_link_libraries(test_fmu PRIVATE Engine)
if (CMAKE_C_COMPILER_ID MATCHES "GNU|Clang")
    target_compile_options(test_fmu PRIVATE -Wall -Wextra)
endif()
add_test(NAME smoke COMMAND test_fmu)
